---
title: Components
description: Live demos of every shinyblocks component.
---

Every exported `block_*()` has a page below with an embedded
Shinylive demo and the source code that produced it. The grouping
mirrors the reference index in `_pkgdown.yml`.

## Layout

- [Page](components/page.html) — top-level shell. *Page in progress.*
- [Header](components/header.html) — top bar landmark. *Page in progress.*
- [Sidebar](components/sidebar.html) — left navigation panel. *Page in progress.*
- [Body](components/body.html) — main content landmark. *Page in progress.*

## Navigation

- [Nav item](components/nav-item.html) — sidebar link with selected state. *Page in progress.*

## Content

- [Card](components/card.html) — surface for grouped content. *Page in progress.*
- [Badge](components/badge.html) — small status label. *Page in progress.*
- [Alert](components/alert.html) — inline message with `role="alert"`. *Page in progress.*

## Action

- [Button](components/button.html) — clickable action with variants and sizes.

## Icon

- [Icon](components/icon.html) — vendored Lucide sprite. *Page in progress.*

::: {.callout-note}
This index grows as components land. New `block_*()` exports must add
their page in the same commit; missing pages block the Quality Gate
([ADR 0013](../docs/decisions/0013-component-gallery-quarto.md)).
:::
